title: SweechBar click card to launch with profile selection
description: Clicking the launch button should offer options: launch fresh, continue last, launch with yolo mode.

context.text: Launch button now has context menu: Fresh session, Continue last, Yolo mode, Copy command. Uses Menu+Label pattern with chevron indicator.

acceptanceCriteria: Context menu on launch button: Fresh / Continue / Yolo
Each option opens Terminal with correct flags
Keyboard shortcut: Enter launches top recommended account
